heroHeadline: KMT Chair Cheng Li-wun at Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum in Nanjing — Day 2; PLA 2 Sorties + 9 PLAN Vessels April 8; Both Sorties Cross Median Line Into Northern + SE ADIZ
heroSubtitle: Cheng Li-wun visits Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum Apr 8 (Nanjing); calls for 'seeds of peace'; Taiwan MAC criticizes 'veiled' ROC references; Xi Jinping meeting in Beijing unconfirmed; PLA 2 sorties + 9 PLAN vessels Apr 8 — uptick from Apr 7; both sorties cross median line into northern AND southeastern ADIZ sectors (first northern incursion since late-March spike); combined pressure-and-dialogue signaling pattern continues; 36 days to Trump-Xi Beijing summit (May 14-15); Taiwan defense budget stalemate continues
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, Japan Times, ANI News, Vision Times, South China Morning Post, Taiwan News, Asia Times, The Asia Cable, GlobalSecurity.org, Xinhua, CGTN, The Diplomat, Washington Times, Global Times, People's Daily Online, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
